conflictBlocks.oursContent:
<span className="px-2 py-1 bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 rounded font-medium">
            {applicationStatusLabel || ""}
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
<span className="px-2 py-1 bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 rounded font-medium capitalize">
            {applicationStatusLabel || job.application_status}

conflictBlocks.oursContent:
<span className="px-2 py-1 bg-green-100 text-green-800 text-xs font-medium rounded">
              {applicationStatusLabel}
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
<span className="px-2 py-1 bg-green-100 text-green-800 text-xs font-medium rounded capitalize">
              {applicationStatusLabel || applicationStatus}
